Flow.description: This flow is a validation rule to make sure that when users are changing the main practitioner that they are choosing people of the same Practice Group.
Flow.interviewLabel: Record Trigger - Validation - Main Practitioner Practice Group Mismatch {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Record Trigger - Validation - Main Practitioner Practice Group Mismatch

start.filterFormula: IF({!$UserRole.Name} = 'System Administration', FALSE, IF(ISNULL({!$Record__Prior.Main_Practitioner__c}) || ISBLANK({!$Record__Prior.Main_Practitioner__c}),FALSE, IF( ISNULL({!$Record__Prior.Main_Practitioner__r.Practice_Group__r.External_Id__c}) || ISBLANK({!$Record__Prior.Main_Practitioner__r.Practice_Group__r.External_Id__c}), FALSE, IF({!$Record.Main_Practitioner__r.Practice_Group__r.External_Id__c} != {!$Record__Prior.Main_Practitioner__r.Practice_Group__r.External_Id__c}, TRUE, FALSE))))
